title: Goal closeout: Thermal Buffeting Plume (019e5f) - hard/critical curation verified
body: Completion audit for the persistent knowledge-curation goal: re-grounded in oak-start-right-team and oak-consolidate-docs, identity preflight confirmed Thermal Buffeting Plume / codex / GPT-5 / 019e5f, watcher and heartbeat active during audit. Fresh fitness evidence: practice:fitness:informational and practice:fitness --strict-hard both returned SOFT (20 soft), no critical or hard files. Controlling plan memory-surface-critical-drain already marks Phase 4 complete for the hard/critical objective; remaining Phase 2/3 lanes are soft, trigger/owner-gated queue processing. Knowledge homes: critical-drain substance is in permanent homes, active pending-graduations shards, owner-decision packet entries, or curator pass metadata as appropriate; no archive move used as substitute for processing. Validations: focused markdownlint clean, git diff --check clean, collaboration-state check ok. My active claim state: none; current active peer claim is Stormy on EEF plan files, non-overlapping.
